issues_found: PAGE_TYPE metadata claims 'press_release' but actual content is a listing/index page containing dozens of separate press releases
Source is a container page (listing of ~60+ disparate announcements) — not a single archiveable document
Most contained items are not relevant to macro catalysts or market structure (enforcement actions, banking applications, CRA updates)
No single coherent topic; source aggregates unrelated Federal Reserve communications from 2023
Published_at (12/20/2023) is the index compilation date, not representative of any contained item
Content was truncated per source warning, further reducing archival value
event_type set to 'unknown' but source type is inherently not archivable as a single record
Cannot support meaningful summary or key_points for RAG applications due to lack of topical coherence
human_review_reason: Source is a listing page requiring individual document extraction. PAGE_TYPE metadata is misclassified. Human review needed to confirm rejection and note that FOMC minutes and reserve balance surveys from this index should be extracted as separate records.
